methodology: Derived from customer KPI pyramids, 1-year product strategy horizons, and delivery activity using an OKR-inspired structure.

goals.title: 2026-Q2 Individual Seller / Landlord outcome goal
goals.objective: Prepare to improve Estimation-to-listing conversion for Individual Seller / Landlord by advancing strengthen owner acquisition funnels, valuation credibility, and self-serve listing basics. through owner intent capture and listing reliability.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Difference between realized economics and the owner's realistic market target after fees, vacancy, and concessions.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Revenue generated from owners through listing products, supply lead monetization, and related services.

keyResults.baseline: Baseline to be confirmed from quarterly reporting
keyResults.statement: Increase Net proceeds / yield realization during the quarter.

keyResults.statement: Increase Price and market fit during the quarter.

keyResults.statement: Increase Supply monetization revenue during the quarter.

goals.title: 2026-Q2 Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager outcome goal
goals.objective: Prepare to improve Qualified lead-to-viewing rate for Brokerage Owner / Agency Growth Manager by advancing fix b2b workflow gaps, prove lead quality, and improve listing operations fundamentals. through professional workflow and roi foundation.

linkedCustomerKPIs.description: Incremental brokerage revenue generated from listings and buyer/seller demand captured through the platform.

linkedBusinessKPIs.description: Recurring and usage-based revenue from agencies, brokers, and professional operators on the platform.
